body:
## Summary
- Updates static ebook chapter 11 citizenship residence/conduct copy for the 6 June 2026 Migrationsverket rule changes.
- Replaces stale criminal-record-only and 5-year residence reductions across localized chapter 11 copy with cautious wording about the stricter conduct requirement, longer waiting periods after offences, and individual Migrationsverket decisions.
- Adds static parity/source-provenance guards and fixes validate-content's generated-question mirror to apply the same localization pilot as runtime data.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/content-static-site-ebook-parity.test.js scripts/static-site-source-provenance-copy.test.js --test-name-pattern "conduct|orderly|honest|skötsam|hederligt|karenstid|waiting period|Migrationsverket|6 June|6 juni"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: static ebook: current conduct requirement copy
